title: zanthoxylum usambarense
intro: Zanthoxylum usambarense, a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, is commonly known as the Usambare Zanthoxylum or the Usambare Prickly Ash. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum usambarense include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used as an essential oil for topical applications, providing relief from skin irritations and insect bites.
